section.title: Before you book.
section.subtitle: Can't find your answer here? Message us on WhatsApp.

questions.q: Do you require a trial sitting before bridal bookings?
questions.a: Yes — every bridal package includes at least one trial sitting so the final look is agreed before your event date. Editorial Bridal and Full Wedding Week include two.

questions.q: How far in advance should I book for wedding season?
questions.a: We recommend booking bridal dates 2–3 months ahead during peak wedding season (Oct–Feb), since we cap bridal bookings to one client per artist per day.

questions.q: Do you use single-use applicators for waxing and threading?
questions.a: Always. Every waxing and threading service uses sterilised tools and single-use applicators as standard practice, not an add-on.

questions.q: Can I get a patch test before a facial or colouring service?
questions.a: Yes, and we recommend it if you have sensitive skin or haven't used a product line with us before. Ask at consultation and we'll schedule it 24 hours ahead.

questions.q: What's your cancellation policy for bridal packages?
questions.a: Bridal bookings require a 30% advance to hold the date. Rescheduling is free with 7+ days' notice; cancellations within 7 days retain the advance as a studio credit.

questions.q: Do you offer at-home or venue bridal service?
questions.a: Yes, for Editorial Bridal and Full Wedding Week packages within Basti city limits. Travel charges apply beyond a 10km radius.
